creator: ady@freebsd.ady.ro
text:
The author released yet another small update which fixes additional
buffer overflows in dummy.c and env_unix.c in src/osdep/unix.

Fix: I've attached a compressed patch to update the port (including a
missing "Version required" header).

  Thanks go to Dmitry Sivachenko <dima@Chg.RU> for noticing me.

 Thanks,
 Ady (@freebsd.ady.ro)
How-To-Repeat: 
 N/A
